facilities.name: Brownsville Landfill
facilities.hours: Check the City of Brownsville for current landfill hours before visiting.
facilities.fees: Landfill fees vary by load type, weight, and residency status. Confirm current rates before arrival.
facilities.rules: Use the official city page to confirm accepted loads, resident rules, and payment procedures before driving.

facilities.name: Brownsville Landfill Used Motor Oil and Filter Drop-Off
facilities.hours: Check the City of Brownsville for current used motor oil and filter drop-off guidance before visiting.
facilities.fees: Household used motor oil and filter drop-off is generally resident-focused. Confirm current limits before arrival.
not_accepted: Materials outside posted household program rules
facilities.rules: Use the official city landfill page to confirm quantity limits and any preparation requirements before driving.

facilities.name: Brownsville Landfill Tire Drop-Off
facilities.hours: Check the City of Brownsville for current tire disposal guidance before visiting.
facilities.fees: Tire disposal rules and limits vary. Confirm current limits and any fees before arrival.
facilities.rules: Use the official city landfill page to confirm the current tire limit per visit and any preparation requirements before driving.
